working_on.task: Diagnose app performance and identify bottlenecks

pending_tasks.task: C3: Add dispatchers.IO to python execution logic to prevent ANR
C2: Execute metadata fetch and transcript fetch in parallel
C1: Enforce Singleton for Repositories and quota managers
Optimize Prompt AI for Gemini 2.5 Flash thinking capability
Clean up dead legacy backend code from Android app limits

recent_changes.description: Executed Performance Audit. Found 3 critical issues (blocking I/O, synchronous remote fetching, non-singleton manager creations) that severely impacts Android UX.
Fixed 'Unknown python error' by explicitly adding requests & defusedxml to Gradle pip block, and using PyObject.asMap() to correctly read Python dict keys in Kotlin.
Fixed build.gradle.kts python block syntax for Chaquopy 17.0 and eliminated unresolved PythonManager references
Implemented UX improvements: API Key multi-paste with regex parsing, Quick Paste & Summarize button, Loading Indicator text, Copy Summary button, and fixing Swipe Back interaction.

errors_encountered.error: PyObject.get() returns null for Python dict keys
errors_encountered.solution: Use PyObject.asMap()[PyObject.fromJava('key')] to invoke __getitem__ instead of getattr when reading Python dicts in Kotlin.

errors_encountered.error: Text and buttons inside GlassCard are blurry and unreadable
errors_encountered.solution: Jetpack Compose Modifier.blur() blurred the entire component tree. Removed it from GlassCard so only the gradient is used.

decisions_made.reason: Standalone logic via local IP is now fully verified and bypasses YouTube blocks.
Superior thinking/reasoning capability for video summarization.
